query:
INSERT INTO membership_events (email, member_id, name, event_type, tier, plan, amount, event_timestamp, processed_at, source, encharge_tagged, notes)
SELECT 
  m.email,
  m.id AS member_id,
  m.name,
  'joined' AS event_type,
  CASE 
    WHEN m.membershipTier IN ('all_access_aces','swing_savers','golf_vx_pro','trial','none') THEN m.membershipTier
    WHEN m.membershipTier = 'monthly' THEN 'swing_savers'
    WHEN m.membershipTier = 'annual' THEN 'all_access_aces'
    ELSE 'none'
  END AS tier,
  COALESCE(m.paymentInterval, 'monthly') AS plan,
  m.monthlyAmount AS amount,
  m.joinDate AS event_timestamp,
  NOW() AS processed_at,
  'backfill' AS source,
  FALSE AS encharge_tagged,
  'Backfilled from existing member record' AS notes
FROM members m
WHERE m.status IN ('active', 'trial')
  AND m.email NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT email FROM membership_events WHERE event_type = 'joined')
ORDER BY m.joinDate;

SELECT 
  m.email,
  m.id AS member_id,
  m.name,

  CASE

    WHEN m.membershipTier = 'monthly' THEN 'swing_savers'
    WHEN m.membershipTier = 'annual' THEN 'all_access_aces'
    ELSE 'none'
  END AS tier,
  COALESCE(m.paymentInterval, 'monthly') AS plan,
  m.monthlyAmount AS amount,
  m.joinDate AS event_timestamp,
  NOW() AS processed_at,

  FALSE AS encharge_tagged,
  'Backfilled from existing member record' AS notes
FROM members m
WHERE m.status IN ('active', 'trial')
  AND m.email NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT email FROM membership_events WHERE event_type = 'joined')
ORDER BY m.joinDate;
